pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage where the signed-in or guest user lands to quickly start actions like ordering, finding stores, and accessing account features. Includes global header controls for Log In and Sign Up.
primary_functions: View featured drinks, promotions, and a summary of the favorite or nearest store
Start a pickup order using a prominent call-to-action
Access key account areas such as dashboard, rewards, and order history via shortcuts

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary "Order Pickup" call-to-action or the "Order Pickup" header link.

params.zip: zip code value entered into the homepage store search field

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the store search form on the homepage.
Click the account name/avatar or the "Account" header link after logging in.
Click a featured rewards or "Bakery Rewards" promotion on the homepage.
Click a "View Past Orders" shortcut card on the homepage.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Home" header link or by clicking the site logo.
Users can navigate directly to index.html or the site root.

pages.name: Stores Search & Results
pages.description: Page for searching and browsing nearby coffee shop locations using ZIP code or current location, then choosing a store to view details or start an order.
primary_functions: Search for cafés by ZIP code or current location
View a list of nearby stores with distance in miles, hours, and basic details
Select a store to view its detailed page and potentially choose it for ordering

incoming_params.description: ZIP code used to pre-populate and auto-run the store search when arriving on the page.

params.id: ID of the store whose card or "View Details" link was clicked
params.fromZip: the ZIP code currently shown in the search input

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a store name or its "View Details" link in the search results.

params.pickupStoreId: ID of the store for which the user clicked "Order Pickup" in the results list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an "Order Pickup" or equivalent action on a specific store row.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Stores" header link.
Accessed via the "Stores" footer link.
Accessed as stores.html?zip=94103 to pre-run a search for a given ZIP code.
Users can browse directly to stores.html without any parameters.

pages.name: Store Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single café location, allowing the user to view full information and set it as their favorite or start an order from it.
primary_functions: View full store details including address, map preview, hours, amenities, and distance
Set or update this store as the account’s favorite store
Start a pickup order specifically from this store

incoming_params.description: Store ID to display details for.
ZIP code from the previous search results, used for a "Back to results" link.

params.zip: value of the fromZip parameter if present

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to search results" link.
Click the "Order Pickup from this Store" button (after optionally calling setCurrentPickupStore).

access_methods.description: Accessed as store_detail.html?id={storeId}[&fromZip=94103].
Reached from a store list or from a saved bookmark to a specific store.

pages.name: Menu / Order Start
pages.description: Entry point for building a pickup order and browsing the menu by category. Includes a store selection overlay that can use the favorite store.
primary_functions: Confirm or change the pickup store using a store selection overlay that can use the favorite store
Browse the full menu organized into categories such as lattes, espresso drinks, and bakery items
Filter or switch between categories (for example, show only lattes or only bakery items)
Open individual product detail pages to customize items before adding them to the order
See a mini-summary of the current order and navigate to the full order review page

incoming_params.description: Store ID to preselect as the pickup location when opening the menu.
Menu category slug (e.g., "lattes", "bakery") to open by default.

params.id: ID of the menu product whose card was clicked

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product card in any menu category.
Click the mini cart / "View Order" button from the menu page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Order Pickup" header link.
Accessed as menu.html?pickupStoreId={id}&category=lattes to deep-link to a store and category.
Users can go directly to menu.html to start browsing and then choose a store.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Page for viewing and customizing a single drink or food item before adding it to the order, including size, milk, and pickup time selection.
primary_functions: View product name, description, image, rating, and price for each available size
Select drink options such as size (including Medium and Large) and milk or other customizations
Select a pickup time slot by choosing a date and an available time (for example, the time closest to 8:30 AM between 8:00–9:00 AM tomorrow)
Add the configured item to the current pickup order
When opened from order history, review and adjust the previous configuration (such as size) before re-adding the item to the order

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details and configuration options should be displayed.
Category slug the user navigated from, used for a "Back to menu" link.
Past order item ID used to pre-fill the configuration using getOrderItemConfiguration when reordering.

params.highlightItemId: ID of the order item returned from addProductToCurrentOrder

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "View Order" or "Go to Cart" button after adding the product.
Click a "Back to Menu" link.

access_methods.description: Accessed as product.html?id={productId}[&fromCategory=lattes][&orderItemId=abc].
Arrives from menu cards or past orders when viewing/reordering an item.

pages.name: Current Order / Cart
pages.description: Order review page showing all items the user has added for pickup, where they can finalize item details, pickup time, and payment before placing the order.
primary_functions: View the list of items currently in the pickup order with sizes, options, quantities, and prices
Edit items in the order, such as changing size/options or removing items
Confirm the pickup store and overall pickup time window for the order
Proceed to checkout using saved payment methods (payment entry handled via saved cards in the account wallet)

incoming_params.description: Optional order ID for deep-linking to a specific active order; if omitted, the current draft order is shown.
Optional order item ID that should be scrolled into view or highlighted when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Add More Items" from the cart.
Click a "Manage Cards" or "Edit Payment Methods" link from the payment section.
Click a "View Available Rewards" link within the order page.

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking a mini-cart icon in the global header.
Accessed as order.html[?orderId=123][&highlightItemId=abc].

pages.name: Account Dashboard
pages.description: Central account overview page the user can access after signing in or creating an account, summarizing favorite store, loyalty, and key shortcuts.
primary_functions: View a personalized greeting along with key info such as favorite store and loyalty points balance
See quick links to start a new order, view order history, manage rewards, and manage payment methods
Access deeper account settings including notification preferences and security/password settings

incoming_params.description: Optional indicator of how the user arrived here (e.g., "signup" after creating a new account).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Order History" quick link.
Click the "Payment Methods" quick link.
Click the "Notification Preferences" link.
Click the "Security / Password" settings link.
Click the "Rewards" shortcut or loyalty summary card.
Click "Start an Order" from the dashboard.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Account" header link when logged in.
Users can bookmark and return directly to account_dashboard.html (requires an active session to show personalized data).

pages.name: Payment Methods / Wallet
pages.description: Page for managing saved payment cards used for pickup orders, including adding new cards and setting a default card.
primary_functions: View a list of saved payment cards, clearly indicating which card is set as the default
Add a new payment card by entering card number, expiration date, and CVV
Set any saved card (including newly added cards) as the default payment method for future orders
Remove or deactivate existing payment cards from the wallet

incoming_params.description: Optional page filename (e.g., "order.html") indicating where to return after managing payment methods.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Order" or "Return to Checkout" link when returnTo=order.html.
Click a "Back to Account" breadcrumb from the wallet page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Payment Methods" footer link.
Accessed directly as account_payments.html or via the Account Dashboard quick link.

pages.name: Rewards Overview
pages.description: Overview page for the loyalty program, showing available rewards, filters, and the user’s points balance.
primary_functions: View the current loyalty points balance and a summary of recent reward activity
Browse available rewards as a grid or list of reward cards
Filter rewards by category (for example, show only bakery or pastries rewards)
Filter or sort rewards by rating (such as showing only items with at least 4 stars) and by price
Open a reward detail page for a specific item to see more information and redeem

incoming_params.description: Reward category key (e.g., "bakery") used to pre-filter the rewards list.
Minimum star rating filter (e.g., 4) applied to rewards list.
Maximum price filter (e.g., 5.00) applied to rewards list.
Sorting key for reward list (e.g., "rating_desc", "price_asc").

params.fromCategory: current category filter value, if any

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reward card or its "View Reward" link.
Click a "Browse Bakery Items" CTA from the rewards overview (e.g., after viewing bakery rewards).

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Rewards" header link.
Users can go directly to rewards.html, optionally with filter query parameters.
Accessed as rewards.html?category=bakery&minRating=4&maxPrice=5 to deep-link a filtered view.

pages.name: Reward Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific loyalty reward item that can be redeemed with points, and optionally added to the current order.
primary_functions: View reward details including description, rating, applicable store or menu category, and any price information (such as being under $5)
See the points required to redeem the reward and confirm that sufficient points are available
Redeem loyalty points for a single unit of the reward item (for example, a bakery item under $5 with 4+ stars)
After redemption, optionally add the reward item to the current pickup order or view redemption confirmation

incoming_params.description: Reward ID whose details should be displayed.
Category filter the user came from, used for a contextual "Back to rewards" link.

params.category: value of fromCategory parameter, if present

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Rewards" link.

params.highlightItemId: ID of the order item created when addRewardRedemptionToCurrentOrder is called

outgoing_connections.trigger: After redeeming and choosing to "Add to Order" or "View Order" for the redeemed item.

access_methods.description: Accessed as reward_detail.html?id={rewardId}[&fromCategory=bakery].
Arrives from clicking a reward card on rewards.html.

pages.name: Order History
pages.description: Page listing the user’s past orders and allowing reordering of items, including scanning for the cheapest large drink.
primary_functions: View a list of past orders and/or individual items, including item name, size (such as Large), price, and order date
Sort orders or items using options that make prices easy to scan (for example, sort by price low to high)
Identify the cheapest drink that is size Large by scanning listed items and their prices
From an item row, either order it again directly or open its product detail page with previous configuration preselected before adding it to the current order

incoming_params.description: Sorting key for history items such as "date_desc" or "price_asc".
Page number for paginated order history results.
Items per page for order history pagination.

params.id: productId associated with the selected past item
params.orderItemId: orderItemId of the selected past item

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "View Details" link on a specific past order item.

params.highlightItemId: ID of the new order item returned after calling reorderPastItem

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an "Order Again" button that directly reorders the item.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Order History" footer link.
Accessed from the Account Dashboard or via bookmarked account_orders.html.
Accessed as account_orders.html?sortBy=price_asc&page=1&pageSize=20 for specific sort/pagination.

pages.name: Notification Preferences
pages.description: Settings page where the user controls email, push, and SMS notification preferences, including configuring SMS-only order updates.
primary_functions: Enable or disable categories of email notifications, such as turning off promotional or marketing emails while leaving order-related emails unchanged
Turn off all categories of push notifications
Turn on only the SMS option specifically related to order updates or order status messages
Save all notification preference changes so they apply to future communications

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Account" or "Account Overview" link after saving preferences.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the account dashboard or account menu as "Settings" / "Notification Preferences".

pages.name: Security / Password Settings
pages.description: Security-focused settings page where the user can view basic security info and change their account password using the current password.
primary_functions: Change the account password by entering the current password and a new password (with confirmation)
Validate password change inputs and update the stored password when the form is submitted
Provide access to log out of the current session via security-related controls (actual logout action handled globally in the header/account menu)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Account" breadcrumb after updating the password.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the account dashboard or account menu as "Security" or "Password" settings.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page describing the coffee shop brand, history, and values, independent of account-specific functionality.
primary_functions: Read about the coffee shop’s story, mission, and sourcing practices
Understand the brand positioning and what differentiates the café experience

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Contact Us" link from the About page content.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "About" footer link.
Users can browse directly to about.html.

pages.name: Contact / Support
pages.description: Page providing ways to contact the coffee shop for support or feedback via a form and direct contact information.
primary_functions: Submit questions, feedback, or support requests via a simple contact form
View contact details such as customer service email, phone number, and support hours

incoming_params.description: Optional support topic key used to preselect the subject in the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: From a post-submission confirmation, click a "Go to My Account" link when logged in.
Click a "View Help Articles" or "Help & FAQ" link from the contact page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Contact" footer link.
Accessible directly as contact.html.
Form submission stays on the same page and shows a confirmation message after calling submitSupportRequest.

pages.name: Help / FAQ
pages.description: Self-service support page answering common questions about the website and services, with topic navigation and detailed FAQ articles.
primary_functions: Browse frequently asked questions related to ordering, pickup, rewards, and account management
Access step-by-step help articles for tasks such as setting a favorite store, redeeming rewards, and managing notifications

incoming_params.description: Slug of a help article to open directly (e.g., "set-favorite-store").

params.articleSlug: slug of the article selected from the topics list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a help topic or FAQ item to load its full article content.

params.topic: derived topic key based on the currently viewed article

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Contact Support" link from within a help article.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Help & FAQ" footer link.
Accessed as help.html?articleSlug=set-favorite-store to open a specific help article.
Users can go directly to help.html to browse topics.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and services, including ordering and participation in the loyalty program.
primary_functions: Read the terms and conditions for using the website, placing orders, and participating in the loyalty program

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Privacy Policy" link from within the terms content.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Terms of Use" footer link.
Accessible directly as terms.html.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Privacy policy explaining how user data is collected, stored, and used, including account, payment, and location information.
primary_functions: Understand how personal information, order history, payment data, and location data are handled
Review user rights regarding data access, correction, and deletion

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Terms of Use" link from within the privacy policy content.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Privacy Policy" footer link.
Accessible directly as privacy.html.

header_links.description: Homepage with featured items, favorite store summary, and quick actions
Browse the menu, select a store, and start a pickup order
Search for nearby cafés and view store details
View loyalty points and browse available rewards to redeem
Access the account dashboard, order history, settings, and payment methods

footer_links.description: Learn more about the coffee shop and its story
Get in touch with customer support or send feedback
Find answers to common questions about orders, rewards, and account settings
Find a nearby store and view location details
Review past orders and reorder favorite drinks
Manage saved payment cards and default payment settings
Read the legal terms for using the website and services
Review how your personal and order data is collected and used
